babyDevelopment: The baby's eyes, which have been fused shut, finally open! They can see light and dark variations through the uterine wall. Your baby is now roughly the length of a Banana from head-to-heel!
bodyChanges: Your blood pressure may be slightly elevated compared to the second-trimester low. You might feel rib pain as the baby stretches out.
tips: Pre-register at your hospital or birthing center
Talk to the baby—they're listening closely

do: Watch your salt intake if swelling
Do stretching exercises for rib pain
Prepare siblings or pets for the new arrival

travelAdvisory.note: Start restricting travel to areas with good medical care.

warningSignsToWatch: Headache that won't go away with Tylenol
milestoneDescription: Your baby can open their eyes and see the light filtering in!
